title: Hourly gantt view
excerpt: Would love to be able to see my Gantt chart in hourly. My tasks are broken up into multiple things a day so being able to see it hourly vs just daily is important

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to be able to see my Gantt chart in hourly. My tasks are broken up into multiple things a day so being able to see it hourly vs just daily is important

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Josh, we just released Ganttly - a monday.com app allowing you to display your Gantt chart in 15 minutes & 1 hour intervals. Works for items and subitems.

What we can add to make it more useful for your case?
